title: Keep Multiplying Found Values by Two

testcases.input: nums = [5,3,6,1,12], original = 3 Output: 24 Explanation: - 3 is found in nums. 3 is multiplied by 2 to obtain 6. - 6 is found in nums. 6 is multiplied by 2 to obtain 12. - 12 is found in nums. 12 is multiplied by 2 to obtain 24. - 24 is not found in nums. Thus, 24 is returned.
testcases.expectedOutput: 24 Explanation: - 3 is found in nums. 3 is multiplied by 2 to obtain 6. - 6 is found in nums. 6 is multiplied by 2 to obtain 12. - 12 is found in nums. 12 is multiplied by 2 to obtain 24. - 24 is not found in nums. Thus, 24 is returned.

testcases.input: nums = [2,7,9], original = 4 Output: 4 Explanation: - 4 is not found in nums. Thus, 4 is returned.
testcases.expectedOutput: 4 Explanation: - 4 is not found in nums. Thus, 4 is returned.
